greeting.npc_text: Good morning. I'm afraid all visitors require a valid badge to enter the building.

choices.text: I have a meeting inside. Surely I can just pop through?
What's wrong with the badge printer?
What happens if there's a fire?

no_badge.npc_text: No badge, no entry. Our printer is out of paper and IT hasn't responded in three days, so I cannot issue a temporary pass. I'm sorry.

choices.text: There has to be another way in...

tired_response.npc_text: Absolutely shattered, honestly. I haven't left this desk in four hours. I'm running on empty. Coffee would help, but I can't abandon my post.

choices.text: There's a coffee machine right over there.

coffee_machine_response.npc_text: Don't I know it. I'd kill for a cappuccino right now. There's just something about that frothy milk balance that hits differently. But I simply cannot leave the desk unattended.

choices.text: Understood. I'll leave you to it.

badge_printer_response.npc_text: Out of paper. I logged a ticket with IT on Monday. It's Thursday. I've had better luck communicating with the ficus in the corner.

emergency_response.npc_text: Fire protocol is very clear. All staff must escort visitors through to the designated assembly area — which happens to be inside the building, past this door. Why do you ask?

suspicious.npc_text: Right. Well. Let's hope it doesn't come to that. Is there anything else I can help you with?
